name: eShop
observations: Services: Catalog API, Basket API, Ordering API, Identity API, Webhooks API, OrderProcessor, PaymentProcessor
Database: PostgreSQL with pgvector (catalogdb, identitydb, orderingdb, webhooksdb)
Auth: Duende IdentityServer 7.3.2 + ASP.NET Core Identity
AI: Optional Azure OpenAI / Ollama integration
CI/CD: Azure DevOps with 1ES Pipeline Templates
